Do you have an update?
That's a great question.
I don't have an update as of the last time that we chatted, but let me get one for you today on a timeline.
I'm meeting with the person who owns kind of those in-depth reviews today, so I'll just ask him for a status update and get back to you.
Sorry about that.
I would love to know, like, we have site schema, but...
Yeah.
Is it right?
Is it...
Yeah.
Do we need to do something different, better, et cetera?
Love a review of that.
So that's a high priority for me.
The second thing is on that SEO document that I shared with Vivek, that he's going to get back to you with it, I think what I'm looking for, really the heart of the question is...
I have heard people say, like, oh, don't optimize multiple pages for the same keyword.
But I've got these keywords associated with product pages that are never going to rank and beat our competitors.
Should we use those keywords in blogs also?
And or should we be tracking those keywords on the list of keywords that we're tracking?

So if you could look at that and even via Slack, like sooner rather than later, get back to me with like, hey, I think we should have these keywords to our SEM rush report and we should use these in our blogs moving forward.
Or let's just leave those on the product pages and here's some other keywords based on those that we're going to use instead.
I can't.
That's the answer I'm looking for.
That's what I'm looking for.
Yeah, that's very helpful.
Thank you for giving us like the most important little like nugget to pull out for you.
And we'll do that sooner than later, as you mentioned.
I'll give you an update and then also get you an update today on the site schema.
Thank you for following up.
Sorry that there hasn't been an update just yet.
OK, great.
All right.
I do have to hop to another call, but I love seeing all of you.
And this was very productive.
Thank you for your time.
Bye.
All right.
Talk soon.
Bye, guys.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Rapyd and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and next steps for optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/M8usEbrPS6fcs-RBc5t3918oxBMHtsSH?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Artifact feedback: Need to update company context to reflect evolved story; adjust persona focus away from marketplaces](https://fathom.video/share/M8usEbrPS6fcs-RBc5t3918oxBMHtsSH?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [New topic clusters: Stablecoin payouts and APAC to LATAM e-commerce identified as priorities for content development](https://fathom.video/share/M8usEbrPS6fcs-RBc5t3918oxBMHtsSH?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
  - [SEO strategy: Reviewing product page keywords to determine blog content strategy and keyword tracking](https://fathom.video/share/M8usEbrPS6fcs-RBc5t3918oxBMHtsSH?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)
  - [Content performance: Seeing positive signals in blog traffic and lead generation; aiming for 9 published articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/M8usEbrPS6fcs-RBc5t3918oxBMHtsSH?tab=summary&timestamp=1778.0)

## Topics

### Artifact Feedback and Improvements

  - [Company context needs updating to match Rapyd's evolved story](https://fathom.video/share/M8usEbrPS6fcs-RBc5t3918oxBMHtsSH?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [Persona focus skewed too heavily towards marketplaces; needs adjustment](https://fathom.video/share/M8usEbrPS6fcs-RBc5t3918oxBMHtsSH?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [Card acquiring services not prominently featured enough](https://fathom.video/share/M8usEbrPS6fcs-RBc5t3918oxBMHtsSH?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Need for more specific, granular information on regulations and compliance issues by region](https://fathom.video/share/M8usEbrPS6fcs-RBc5t3918oxBMHtsSH?tab=summary&timestamp=655.0)

### New Content Topic Clusters

  - [Stablecoin payouts identified as a high-priority topic for content development](https://fathom.video/share/M8usEbrPS6fcs-RBc5t3918oxBMHtsSH?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
  - [APAC to LATAM e-commerce project also highlighted for potential blog content](https://fathom.video/share/M8usEbrPS6fcs-RBc5t3918oxBMHtsSH?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
  - [Process established to create new topic clusters:](https://fathom.video/share/M8usEbrPS6fcs-RBc5t3918oxBMHtsSH?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)
    1.  Compile existing internal documentation
    2.  Share with GrowthX team for review
    3.  Schedule discussion with subject matter expert (e.g., Kristen for Stablecoins)
    4.  Develop content strategy based on discussion

### SEO Strategy and Optimization

  - [Reviewing product page keywords to determine blog content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/M8usEbrPS6fcs-RBc5t3918oxBMHtsSH?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)
  - [Question raised about using product page keywords in blog content or tracking them separately](https://fathom.video/share/M8usEbrPS6fcs-RBc5t3918oxBMHtsSH?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide recommendations on keyword usage and tracking](https://fathom.video/share/M8usEbrPS6fcs-RBc5t3918oxBMHtsSH?tab=summary&timestamp=1778.0)
  - [Balancing SEO optimization with AI/LLM visibility in search results](https://fathom.video/share/M8usEbrPS6fcs-RBc5t3918oxBMHtsSH?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)

### Content Performance and Production

  - [Positive signals in blog traffic and engagement metrics](https://fathom.video/share/M8usEbrPS6fcs-RBc5t3918oxBMHtsSH?tab=summary&timestamp=1778.0)
  - [9 articles per week identified as current publishing goal](https://fathom.video/share/M8usEbrPS6fcs-RBc5t3918oxBMHtsSH?tab=summary&timestamp=1626.0)
  - [New HubSpot dashboard tracking contacts generated from blog content](https://fathom.video/share/M8usEbrPS6fcs-RBc5t3918oxBMHtsSH?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [10 contacts generated in July, primarily from organic search](https://fathom.video/share/M8usEbrPS6fcs-RBc5t3918oxBMHtsSH?tab=summary&timestamp=1904.0)
  - [Working towards tracking closed deals originating from blog content](https://fathom.video/share/M8usEbrPS6fcs-RBc5t3918oxBMHtsSH?tab=summary&timestamp=1952.0)

### Content Review Process

  - [Current bottleneck in review process due to multiple reviewers](https://fathom.video/share/M8usEbrPS6fcs-RBc5t3918oxBMHtsSH?tab=summary&timestamp=1691.0)
  - [Working towards streamlining process to reduce dependencies on Mark Stiltner](https://fathom.video/share/M8usEbrPS6fcs-RBc5t3918oxBMHtsSH?tab=summary&timestamp=1704.0)

### Technical SEO Review

  - [Site schema review requested as high priority](https://fathom.video/share/M8usEbrPS6fcs-RBc5t3918oxBMHtsSH?tab=summary&timestamp=2025.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide update on timeline for site schema analysis](https://fathom.video/share/M8usEbrPS6fcs-RBc5t3918oxBMHtsSH?tab=summary&timestamp=2008.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Vanessa to compile and share Stablecoin documentation from Confluence with GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/M8usEbrPS6fcs-RBc5t3918oxBMHtsSH?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
  - [GrowthX to review Stablecoin docs and prepare questions for next week's meeting with Kristen](https://fathom.video/share/M8usEbrPS6fcs-RBc5t3918oxBMHtsSH?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide recommendations on product page keyword usage in blogs and tracking](https://fathom.video/share/M8usEbrPS6fcs-RBc5t3918oxBMHtsSH?tab=summary&timestamp=1778.0)
  - [GrowthX to deliver SEO work review by end of the week](https://fathom.video/share/M8usEbrPS6fcs-RBc5t3918oxBMHtsSH?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide update on site schema review timeline](https://fathom.video/share/M8usEbrPS6fcs-RBc5t3918oxBMHtsSH?tab=summary&timestamp=2008.0)
  - [Add Kristen to next week's meeting to discuss Stablecoin content](https://fathom.video/share/M8usEbrPS6fcs-RBc5t3918oxBMHtsSH?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)
  - [Discuss APAC to LATAM e-commerce content strategy in next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/M8usEbrPS6fcs-RBc5t3918oxBMHtsSH?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
  - [Continue monitoring and reporting on blog performance and lead generation metrics](https://fathom.video/share/M8usEbrPS6fcs-RBc5t3918oxBMHtsSH?tab=summary&timestamp=1778.0)

action_items.description: Compile Stablecoin docs from Confluence, share with GrowthX and Mark
Review Stablecoin docs from Vanessa, approve for sharing with GrowthX
Make copy of SEO spreadsheet for Rapyd product pages, share with team
Get status update on site schema review, report back to Mark today
Analyze product page keywords, recommend blog usage + SEMrush tracking. Slack Mark ASAP
